description.content: Drug-related endpoints (adverse events, labeling, recalls, NDC).
Query the FDA Adverse Event Reporting System (FAERS) for drug adverse event reports submitted since 2004.

query.description: Lucene-style search expression scoped to the dataset's fields.
Field to sort by, with optional direction (e.g. `receivedate:desc`).
Field to count occurrences against (returns aggregated terms).
Maximum number of records to return (max 1000).
Number of records to skip for pagination (max 25,000).

description.content:
openFDA is an Elasticsearch-based public API serving FDA data on drugs, devices, foods, animal/veterinary products, and tobacco. Each noun exposes one or more categories (adverse events, recall enforcement reports, labeling, classification, registration, etc.).

Contact Support:
 Name: openFDA
 Email: open@fda.hhs.gov
